tasks.label: build-only frontend redirect
tasks.command: cd fe && npm run build-only > build_error.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: Run conversion and build
tasks.command: python3 fe/convert_pass_2.py && cd fe && npm run build-only

tasks.label: Run conversion and build log
tasks.command: python3 fe/convert_pass_2.py && cd fe && npm run build-only > build_log.txt 2>&1
